scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue --kill-others "pnpm --filter ./packages/server dev" "wait-on http://localhost:3000/ready && pnpm --filter ./packages/client dev"
scripts.preview: pnpm build && concurrently -n server,client -c green,blue --kill-others "pnpm --filter ./packages/server start" "wait-on http://localhost:3000/ready && pnpm --filter ./packages/client preview"
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
